parsed.rationale: The diagram explicitly labels the Epiproct as a structure located at the tip of the male abdomen. In contrast, the female abdomen is labeled with a Cercus, which is also present in the male diagram. The Metepisternum and Postclypeus are labeled on the thorax and head, respectively, which are common to both sexes.
